title: Stage2 micro-pilot cap closure for external finalization and independent replay
primary_objectives: Close or explicitly narrow the external-finalization cap from the Stage2 micro-pilot.
Perform a local independent replay from a clean isolated workspace and produce an independent replay receipt.
Turn the discovered Astronomicon admission and resolver blocks into reusable positive-control regression fixtures.
Produce a cap closure decision matrix with honest CLOSED, NARROWED, CARRIED, or BLOCKED status per cap.
Commit and push only scoped artifacts; leave the worktree clean.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim IDE runtime readiness.
Do not claim WARP runtime readiness.
Do not claim external reviewer environment replay if only VM3 local replay was performed.
Do not claim clean PASS if any cap remains active.
Do not erase the previous admission/resolver blocks as errors; preserve them as successful protection cases.
